Population size

Justine Floret

2024-07-09

Library and Data preparation

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2) #melt function
library(forcats) #reorganise in geom boxplot
library(kableExtra) # Markdown table

# Stat library 
# library(lme4)
library(lmerTest) #glht
# library(MASS)
library(lsmeans) #pairwise comparison
library(multcomp)  #glht
library(multcompView)  #glht
library(rstatix) # manova levene test
library(car) # anova

# Graphic library
library(GGally) #ppair plot
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(svglite) # save in svg format
library(corrplot)


setwd("/home/justine/sciebo/1_Populations/3_runs")

data_all <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/1_Populations/2_assay/dataset/Phenology_field.csv")

data_all$Site_ID <- as.factor(data_all$Site_ID)
data_all$Area <- as.factor(data_all$Area)
data_all$Localization_ID <- as.factor(data_all$Localization_ID)
data_all$Type <- as.factor(data_all$Type)
data_all$Destroyed <- as.factor(data_all$Destroyed)
data_all$Outliers_soil <- as.factor(data_all$Outliers_soil)
data_all$Sowing_1st <- as.factor(data_all$Sowing_1st)
data_all$Sowing_2nd <- as.factor(data_all$Sowing_2nd)
data_all$Germ_2ndyear <- as.factor(data_all$Germ_2ndyear)
data_all$Presence_April_22 <- as.factor(data_all$Presence_April_22)
data_all$Presence_April_23 <- as.factor(data_all$Presence_April_23)
data_all$Presence_April_24 <- as.factor(data_all$Presence_April_24)

For all the analysis the sites with no established population are removed.

April 2022

Kept the site destroyed after April 2022

# colors <- c("#6a176e","#bc3754", "#f37819", "#f8cd37")
# colors <- c("#420a68","#932667", "#dd513a", "#fca50a")
# colors <- c("#3b0f70","#8c2981", "#de4968", "#fe9f6d")
colors <- c("#6ece58",  "#22a884", "#355f8d", "#440154")


data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="05/2022" | Destroyed =="09/2022" | Destroyed =="10/2022" | Destroyed =="04/2023"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_22 =="Yes") %>%
  mutate(Type = fct_relevel(Type, 
            "grass", "Tree bed", "pavement", "wall")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Type, y= April_22, fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge())+
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

#ggsave("/home/justine/sciebo/Paper_urban_niche/Figures/Population_size_April22.svg", plot = last_plot(),dpi = 900, device = "svg", bg = "transparent")

model

April22_popsize <- data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="05/2022" | Destroyed =="09/2022" | Destroyed =="10/2022" | Destroyed =="04/2023"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>%  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_22 =="Yes") 

mod5 <- MASS::glm.nb(April_22 ~ Type, data = April22_popsize)

mod6 <- glm(April_22 ~ Type, data = April22_popsize ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod5[["theta"]]))
summary(mod6)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = April_22 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April22_popsize)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   2.42208    0.25736   9.411   <2e-16 ***
## Typepavement  0.08788    0.32167   0.273   0.7851    
## TypeTree bed -0.03457    0.32475  -0.106   0.9154    
## Typewall     -0.88760    0.34412  -2.579   0.0109 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.7647) family taken to be 1.233255)
## 
##     Null deviance: 185.14  on 151  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 171.54  on 148  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 1001.3
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 6
qqnorm(resid(mod6))

car::Anova(mod6)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: April_22
##      LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)  
## Type   11.032  3    0.01155 *
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
car::Anova(mod6, test.statistic="F")
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: April_22
## Error estimate based on Pearson residuals 
## 
##            Sum Sq  Df F value  Pr(>F)  
## Type       13.606   3  3.6775 0.01361 *
## Residuals 182.522 148                  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
summary(glht(mod6 , mcp(Type="Tukey"))) 
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = April_22 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April22_popsize)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)   
## pavement - grass == 0     0.08788    0.32167   0.273  0.99283   
## Tree bed - grass == 0    -0.03457    0.32475  -0.106  0.99957   
## wall - grass == 0        -0.88760    0.34412  -2.579  0.04823 * 
## Tree bed - pavement == 0 -0.12244    0.27652  -0.443  0.97083   
## wall - pavement == 0     -0.97548    0.29903  -3.262  0.00614 **
## wall - Tree bed == 0     -0.85304    0.30234  -2.821  0.02457 * 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)

April 2023

Kept the site destroyed after April 2023

Sowing 2021

I removed the sites sown a second time with 10 000 seeds in July 2022

data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>%  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_23 =="Yes") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Type, y= April_23, fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge())+
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

model

April23_popsize <- data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_23 =="Yes")

mod5 <- MASS::glm.nb(April_23 ~ Type, data = April23_popsize)

mod6 <- glm(April_23 ~ Type, data = April23_popsize ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod5[["theta"]]))
summary(mod6)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = April_23 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April23_popsize)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)    3.1037     0.2991  10.378  < 2e-16 ***
## Typepavement   0.2553     0.3711   0.688  0.49267    
## TypeTree bed   0.6560     0.4006   1.638  0.10396    
## Typewall      -1.1889     0.4187  -2.840  0.00527 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.7539) family taken to be 1.630706)
## 
##     Null deviance: 180.40  on 129  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 148.51  on 126  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 1073.6
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 6
qqnorm(resid(mod6))

car::Anova(mod6)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: April_23
##      LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Type    19.56  3  0.0002094 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
summary(glht(mod6 , mcp(Type="Tukey"))) 
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = April_23 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April23_popsize)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## pavement - grass == 0      0.2553     0.3711   0.688   0.9011    
## Tree bed - grass == 0      0.6560     0.4006   1.638   0.3556    
## wall - grass == 0         -1.1889     0.4187  -2.840   0.0229 *  
## Tree bed - pavement == 0   0.4007     0.3453   1.160   0.6504    
## wall - pavement == 0      -1.4442     0.3662  -3.944   <0.001 ***
## wall - Tree bed == 0      -1.8449     0.3960  -4.659   <0.001 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)
leastsquare = lsmeans(mod6, pairwise ~ Type,adjust = "tukey")
cld(leastsquare)
##  Type     lsmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL .group
##  wall       1.91 0.293 Inf      1.34      2.49  1    
##  grass      3.10 0.299 Inf      2.52      3.69   2   
##  pavement   3.36 0.220 Inf      2.93      3.79   2   
##  Tree bed   3.76 0.266 Inf      3.24      4.28   2   
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates 
## significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
## NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
##       then we cannot show them to be different.
##       But we also did not show them to be the same.

Sowing 2022

data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_23 =="Yes") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Type == "grass"| Type == "pavement" | Type == "wall") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Type, y= April_23, fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge())+
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

model

April23_popsize2 <- data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Type == "grass"| Type == "pavement" | Type == "wall") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_23 =="Yes")

mod5 <- MASS::glm.nb(April_23 ~ Type, data = April23_popsize2)

mod6 <- glm(April_23 ~ Type, data = April23_popsize2 ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod5[["theta"]]))
summary(mod6)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = April_23 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April23_popsize2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)    4.4018     0.4249  10.361 2.56e-15 ***
## Typepavement  -0.6176     0.5256  -1.175    0.244    
## Typewall      -0.3373     0.4777  -0.706    0.483    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.7601) family taken to be 1.359372)
## 
##     Null deviance: 80.422  on 66  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 78.445  on 64  degrees of freedom
##   (1 observation deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 678.53
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 6
qqnorm(resid(mod6))

car::Anova(mod6)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: April_23
##      LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## Type   1.4539  2     0.4834
summary(glht(mod6 , mcp(Type="Tukey")))
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = April_23 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April23_popsize2)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                       Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## pavement - grass == 0  -0.6176     0.5256  -1.175    0.463
## wall - grass == 0      -0.3373     0.4777  -0.706    0.757
## wall - pavement == 0    0.2803     0.3787   0.740    0.736
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)

Second sowing at the first generation there is no effect of the type of habitat on the population size.

April 2024

The population size could be impacted by the sampling realized in April 2023, the population size may be smaller or the population may have been extinct.
### Sowing 2021 In the graph there is a threshold on the population size, Tree bed environment have population up to 400 individuals

data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_24 =="Yes") %>% dplyr::filter(EndMarch_24 <250) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Type, y= EndMarch_24, fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge())+
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

model

Not threashold applied in the model

April24_popsize <- data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_24 =="Yes")

mod5 <- MASS::glm.nb(EndMarch_24 ~ Type, data = April24_popsize)

mod6 <- glm(EndMarch_24 ~ Type, data = April24_popsize ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod5[["theta"]]))
summary(mod6)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = EndMarch_24 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April24_popsize)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)    2.7695     0.3654   7.580 1.17e-11 ***
## Typepavement   0.7262     0.4567   1.590  0.11469    
## TypeTree bed   1.4310     0.4561   3.138  0.00219 ** 
## Typewall      -0.3946     0.4964  -0.795  0.42842    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.5073) family taken to be 1.312793)
## 
##     Null deviance: 161.51  on 113  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 135.89  on 110  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 964.22
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
qqnorm(resid(mod6))

car::Anova(mod6)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: EndMarch_24
##      LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Type   19.512  3  0.0002142 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
summary(glht(mod6 , mcp(Type="Tukey")))  
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = EndMarch_24 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April24_popsize)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## pavement - grass == 0      0.7262     0.4567   1.590  0.38234    
## Tree bed - grass == 0      1.4310     0.4561   3.138  0.00907 ** 
## wall - grass == 0         -0.3946     0.4964  -0.795  0.85591    
## Tree bed - pavement == 0   0.7048     0.3867   1.822  0.26106    
## wall - pavement == 0      -1.1207     0.4336  -2.585  0.04789 *  
## wall - Tree bed == 0      -1.8255     0.4329  -4.217  < 0.001 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)
leastsquare = lsmeans(mod6, pairwise ~ Type,adjust = "tukey")
cld(leastsquare)
##  Type     lsmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL .group
##  wall       2.37 0.336 Inf      1.72      3.03  1    
##  grass      2.77 0.365 Inf      2.05      3.49  12   
##  pavement   3.50 0.274 Inf      2.96      4.03   23  
##  Tree bed   4.20 0.273 Inf      3.67      4.74    3  
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates 
## significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
## NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
##       then we cannot show them to be different.
##       But we also did not show them to be the same.

Sowing 2022

data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_24 =="Yes") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Type, y= EndMarch_24, fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge())+
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

Not the same pattern as for the 2021 sowing, here wall have bigger population size. May be it is depending of environmental factors ?

model

April24_popsize2 <- data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>%
  dplyr::filter(Presence_April_24 =="Yes")

mod5 <- MASS::glm.nb(EndMarch_24 ~ Type, data = April24_popsize2)

mod6 <- glm(EndMarch_24 ~ Type, data = April24_popsize2 ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod5[["theta"]]))
summary(mod6)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = EndMarch_24 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April24_popsize2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)    3.8317     0.4727   8.107 2.84e-10 ***
## Typepavement  -0.9230     0.5744  -1.607    0.115    
## Typewall       0.3830     0.5345   0.717    0.477    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.6551) family taken to be 1.010204)
## 
##     Null deviance: 64.027  on 46  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 55.240  on 44  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 447.16
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 6
qqnorm(resid(mod6))

car::Anova(mod6)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: EndMarch_24
##      LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)  
## Type   8.6982  2    0.01292 *
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
summary(glht(mod6 , mcp(Type="Tukey")))
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = EndMarch_24 ~ Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = April24_popsize2)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                       Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)   
## pavement - grass == 0  -0.9230     0.5744  -1.607  0.23866   
## wall - grass == 0       0.3830     0.5345   0.717  0.75052   
## wall - pavement == 0    1.3061     0.4108   3.179  0.00406 **
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)

Over years

Sowing 2021

Creation of a data set with all the population size by years (to take into account the destroy size)

Popsize <- data.frame("Site_ID" = paste(April22_popsize$Site_ID, April22_popsize$Type, sep="_"), "Feb_22" = April22_popsize$Feb_22, "April_22" = April22_popsize$April_22, "Oct_22" = April22_popsize$October_22, "Nov_22" = April22_popsize$November_22 )
tmp <- data.frame("Site_ID" = paste(April23_popsize$Site_ID, April23_popsize$Type, sep="_"), "April_23" = April23_popsize$April_23)

Popsize <- full_join(Popsize,tmp, by = join_by(Site_ID == Site_ID))
tmp <- data.frame("Site_ID" = paste(April24_popsize$Site_ID, April24_popsize$Type, sep="_"), "EndMarch_24" = April24_popsize$EndMarch_24)
Popsize <- full_join(Popsize,tmp, by = join_by(Site_ID == Site_ID))

# rearrage the table to have all the population size in the same column
Popsize <- melt(Popsize, id.vars="Site_ID")
Popsize <- Popsize %>% separate("Site_ID", c("Site_ID", "Type"))
colnames(Popsize) <- c("Site_ID", "Type", "Time", "Nb_Idv")

Graphic with no log transformation

ggplot(Popsize, aes(x = Time, y= Nb_Idv, fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

Graphic with log transformation

ggplot(Popsize, aes(x = Time, y= log(Nb_Idv), fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

Popsize %>% filter(Nb_Idv<300) %>%
  ggplot( aes(x=Time, y=log(Nb_Idv), color = Time, group=Type)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete=TRUE) + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, colour= "black")+
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~Type)

model with nested effect

Popsize$Type <- as.factor(Popsize$Type)
Popsize$Time <- as.factor(Popsize$Time)

mod9 <- glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Type/Time, data = Popsize)

mod10 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Type/Time, data = Popsize ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod9[["theta"]]))
summary(mod10)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Type/Time, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod9[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                   1.978345   0.315273   6.275 5.66e-10 ***
## Typepavement                  0.427424   0.392749   1.088 0.276789    
## TypeTree                      0.560030   0.395503   1.416 0.157157    
## Typewall                     -0.145764   0.414667  -0.352 0.725288    
## Typegrass:TimeApril_22        0.443731   0.443144   1.001 0.316967    
## Typepavement:TimeApril_22     0.104183   0.330852   0.315 0.752923    
## TypeTree:TimeApril_22        -0.150865   0.338262  -0.446 0.655716    
## Typewall:TimeApril_22        -0.298107   0.383485  -0.777 0.437170    
## Typegrass:TimeOct_22          0.127907   0.459177   0.279 0.780655    
## Typepavement:TimeOct_22      -0.310155   0.332587  -0.933 0.351325    
## TypeTree:TimeOct_22          -0.688797   0.345153  -1.996 0.046306 *  
## Typewall:TimeOct_22           0.575364   0.377673   1.523 0.128034    
## Typegrass:TimeNov_22          0.194428   0.458707   0.424 0.671778    
## Typepavement:TimeNov_22       0.001959   0.331217   0.006 0.995283    
## TypeTree:TimeNov_22          -0.655644   0.344929  -1.901 0.057678 .  
## Typewall:TimeNov_22           0.749317   0.377002   1.988 0.047192 *  
## Typegrass:TimeApril_23        1.125344   0.445007   2.529 0.011631 *  
## Typepavement:TimeApril_23     0.953246   0.328909   2.898 0.003853 ** 
## TypeTree:TimeApril_23         1.221323   0.368354   3.316 0.000955 ***
## Typewall:TimeApril_23         0.082238   0.406522   0.202 0.839735    
## Typegrass:TimeEndMarch_24     0.791113   0.473095   1.672 0.094866 .  
## Typepavement:TimeEndMarch_24  1.089872   0.353242   3.085 0.002102 ** 
## TypeTree:TimeEndMarch_24      1.662044   0.355520   4.675 3.44e-06 ***
## Typewall:TimeEndMarch_24      0.542324   0.421710   1.286 0.198802    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.5265) family taken to be 1.268398)
## 
##     Null deviance: 1183.47  on 841  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance:  970.25  on 818  degrees of freedom
##   (310 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 5835.5
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
qqnorm(resid(mod10))

car::Anova(mod10)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Type        38.274  3  2.474e-08 ***
## Type:Time  129.829 20  < 2.2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mod10_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod10)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Type)
contrast(emm)  
##  contrast        estimate     SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect     -0.0784 0.1100 Inf  -0.711  0.4769
##  pavement effect   0.2085 0.0894 Inf   2.332  0.0263
##  Tree effect       0.2659 0.0927 Inf   2.869  0.0082
##  wall effect      -0.3960 0.0998 Inf  -3.969  0.0003
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Time 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 4 tests
pairs(emm )
##  contrast         estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass - pavement  -0.2869 0.165 Inf  -1.734  0.3060
##  grass - Tree      -0.3443 0.169 Inf  -2.037  0.1744
##  grass - wall       0.3177 0.177 Inf   1.796  0.2753
##  pavement - Tree   -0.0574 0.142 Inf  -0.403  0.9778
##  pavement - wall    0.6045 0.152 Inf   3.986  0.0004
##  Tree - wall        0.6619 0.156 Inf   4.255  0.0001
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Time 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates
pwpm(emm)
##            grass pavement    Tree   wall
## grass     [2.43]   0.3060  0.1744 0.2753
## pavement -0.2869   [2.71]  0.9778 0.0004
## Tree     -0.3443  -0.0574  [2.77] 0.0001
## wall      0.3177   0.6045  0.6619 [2.11]
## 
## Row and column labels: Type
## Upper triangle: P values   adjust = "tukey"
## Diagonal: [Estimates] (emmean) 
## Lower triangle: Comparisons (estimate)   earlier vs. later

Other model to take into account the emmeans warning meassage

Popsize$Type <- as.factor(Popsize$Type)
Popsize$Time <- as.factor(Popsize$Time)

mod9 <- glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Type*Time, data = Popsize)

mod10 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Type*Time, data = Popsize ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod9[["theta"]]))
summary(mod10)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Type * Time, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod9[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                   1.97835    0.31527   6.275 5.66e-10 ***
## Typepavement                  0.42742    0.39275   1.088   0.2768    
## TypeTree                      0.56003    0.39550   1.416   0.1572    
## Typewall                     -0.14576    0.41467  -0.352   0.7253    
## TimeApril_22                  0.44373    0.44314   1.001   0.3170    
## TimeOct_22                    0.12791    0.45918   0.279   0.7807    
## TimeNov_22                    0.19443    0.45871   0.424   0.6718    
## TimeApril_23                  1.12534    0.44501   2.529   0.0116 *  
## TimeEndMarch_24               0.79111    0.47310   1.672   0.0949 .  
## Typepavement:TimeApril_22    -0.33955    0.55303  -0.614   0.5394    
## TypeTree:TimeApril_22        -0.59460    0.55749  -1.067   0.2865    
## Typewall:TimeApril_22        -0.74184    0.58604  -1.266   0.2059    
## Typepavement:TimeOct_22      -0.43806    0.56697  -0.773   0.4400    
## TypeTree:TimeOct_22          -0.81670    0.57443  -1.422   0.1555    
## Typewall:TimeOct_22           0.44746    0.59454   0.753   0.4519    
## Typepavement:TimeNov_22      -0.19247    0.56579  -0.340   0.7338    
## TypeTree:TimeNov_22          -0.85007    0.57392  -1.481   0.1389    
## Typewall:TimeNov_22           0.55489    0.59375   0.935   0.3503    
## Typepavement:TimeApril_23    -0.17210    0.55336  -0.311   0.7559    
## TypeTree:TimeApril_23         0.09598    0.57768   0.166   0.8681    
## Typewall:TimeApril_23        -1.04311    0.60274  -1.731   0.0839 .  
## Typepavement:TimeEndMarch_24  0.29876    0.59042   0.506   0.6130    
## TypeTree:TimeEndMarch_24      0.87093    0.59179   1.472   0.1415    
## Typewall:TimeEndMarch_24     -0.24879    0.63377  -0.393   0.6947    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.5265) family taken to be 1.268398)
## 
##     Null deviance: 1183.47  on 841  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance:  970.25  on 818  degrees of freedom
##   (310 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 5835.5
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
qqnorm(resid(mod10))

car::Anova(mod10)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Type        11.596  3   0.008902 ** 
## Time        83.750  5  < 2.2e-16 ***
## Type:Time   46.080 15  5.164e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mod10_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod10)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Type |Time)
contrast(emm)  
## Time = Feb_22:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect     -0.2104 0.260 Inf  -0.810  0.4178
##  pavement effect   0.2170 0.213 Inf   1.021  0.4096
##  Tree effect       0.3496 0.215 Inf   1.626  0.2508
##  wall effect      -0.3562 0.232 Inf  -1.533  0.2508
## 
## Time = April_22:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect      0.2086 0.257 Inf   0.811  0.4193
##  pavement effect   0.2964 0.212 Inf   1.397  0.3248
##  Tree effect       0.1740 0.215 Inf   0.808  0.4193
##  wall effect      -0.6790 0.234 Inf  -2.896  0.0151
## 
## Time = Oct_22:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect     -0.0086 0.273 Inf  -0.032  0.9749
##  pavement effect  -0.0192 0.216 Inf  -0.089  0.9749
##  Tree effect      -0.2653 0.223 Inf  -1.189  0.4688
##  wall effect       0.2931 0.232 Inf   1.264  0.4688
## 
## Time = Nov_22:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect     -0.0885 0.272 Inf  -0.325  0.7451
##  pavement effect   0.1464 0.215 Inf   0.683  0.6597
##  Tree effect      -0.3786 0.223 Inf  -1.700  0.3304
##  wall effect       0.3206 0.231 Inf   1.388  0.3304
## 
## Time = April_23:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect      0.0694 0.264 Inf   0.263  0.7924
##  pavement effect   0.3247 0.216 Inf   1.500  0.1782
##  Tree effect       0.7254 0.244 Inf   2.973  0.0059
##  wall effect      -1.1195 0.258 Inf  -4.339  0.0001
## 
## Time = EndMarch_24:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect     -0.4406 0.292 Inf  -1.509  0.1751
##  pavement effect   0.2855 0.241 Inf   1.185  0.2359
##  Tree effect       0.9903 0.240 Inf   4.121  0.0002
##  wall effect      -0.8352 0.275 Inf  -3.035  0.0048
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 4 tests
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Time|Type)
contrast(emm)  
## Type = grass:
##  contrast           estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Feb_22 effect      -0.44709 0.290 Inf  -1.542  0.3694
##  April_22 effect    -0.00336 0.287 Inf  -0.012  0.9907
##  Oct_22 effect      -0.31918 0.304 Inf  -1.052  0.4395
##  Nov_22 effect      -0.25266 0.303 Inf  -0.834  0.4853
##  April_23 effect     0.67826 0.289 Inf   2.346  0.1139
##  EndMarch_24 effect  0.34403 0.317 Inf   1.084  0.4395
## 
## Type = pavement:
##  contrast           estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Feb_22 effect      -0.30652 0.215 Inf  -1.427  0.1873
##  April_22 effect    -0.20233 0.214 Inf  -0.944  0.3452
##  Oct_22 effect      -0.61667 0.216 Inf  -2.853  0.0087
##  Nov_22 effect      -0.30456 0.215 Inf  -1.418  0.1873
##  April_23 effect     0.64673 0.212 Inf   3.046  0.0070
##  EndMarch_24 effect  0.78335 0.237 Inf   3.306  0.0057
## 
## Type = Tree:
##  contrast           estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Feb_22 effect      -0.23134 0.221 Inf  -1.048  0.2948
##  April_22 effect    -0.38221 0.221 Inf  -1.727  0.1011
##  Oct_22 effect      -0.92014 0.228 Inf  -4.030  0.0002
##  Nov_22 effect      -0.88699 0.228 Inf  -3.888  0.0002
##  April_23 effect     0.98998 0.251 Inf   3.939  0.0002
##  EndMarch_24 effect  1.43070 0.239 Inf   5.993  <.0001
## 
## Type = wall:
##  contrast           estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Feb_22 effect      -0.27519 0.249 Inf  -1.107  0.4026
##  April_22 effect    -0.57330 0.251 Inf  -2.282  0.1351
##  Oct_22 effect       0.30017 0.245 Inf   1.224  0.4026
##  Nov_22 effect       0.47413 0.245 Inf   1.938  0.1579
##  April_23 effect    -0.19295 0.274 Inf  -0.703  0.4819
##  EndMarch_24 effect  0.26713 0.289 Inf   0.924  0.4268
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 6 tests

From April 2022 to April 2023

Popsize %>% filter(Nb_Idv<300) %>%
  filter(Time == "April_22" |Time == "Oct_22" |Time =="Nov_22" | Time =="April_23") %>%
  ggplot( aes(x=Time, y=log(Nb_Idv), color = Time, group=Type)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#f5ba98","#ee8a82","#c8586c","#9c3f5d","#9c3f5d")) + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, colour= "#123f5a")+
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~Type)

#ggsave("Population_size_22-23", plot = last_plot(),dpi = 900, device = "svg")
# colors <- c("#6a176e","#bc3754", "#f37819", "#f8cd37")
# colors <- c("#420a68","#932667", "#dd513a", "#fca50a")
# colors <- c("#180f3d","#8c2981", "#de4968", "#fe9f6d")
# colors <- c("#482878", "#31688e", "#1f9e89", "#6ece58")
colors2 <- c("#6ece58",  "#22a884", "#355f8d", "#440154")

Popsize %>% filter(Nb_Idv<300) %>%
  filter(Time == "April_22" |Time == "Oct_22" |Time =="Nov_22" | Time =="April_23") %>%
  mutate(Type = fct_relevel(Type, 
            "grass", "Tree", "pavement", "wall")) %>%
  ggplot( aes(x=Time, y=log(Nb_Idv), color = Type, group=Type, fill= Type)) + 
  geom_smooth( method = "loess", se = TRUE, alpha =0.4, level = 0.75)+
  scale_color_manual(values =colors2)+
  scale_fill_manual(values =colors2)+
  theme_minimal() 

#ggsave("/home/justine/sciebo/Paper_urban_niche/Figures/Population_size_22-23_S1.svg", plot = last_plot(),dpi = 900, device = "svg", bg = "transparent")

model with nested effect

Popsize_2nd <- Popsize %>% filter(Time == "Oct_22" |Time =="Nov_22" | Time =="April_23")
Popsize_2nd$Type <- as.factor(Popsize_2nd$Type)
Popsize_2nd$Time <- as.factor(Popsize_2nd$Time)

mod9 <- glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Time*Type, data = Popsize_2nd)

mod10 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Time*Type, data = Popsize_2nd ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod9[["theta"]]))
summary(mod10)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Time * Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod9[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize_2nd)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                           Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                2.10625    0.36464   5.776 1.51e-08 ***
## TimeNov_22                 0.06652    0.51527   0.129   0.8973    
## TimeApril_23               0.99744    0.50146   1.989   0.0474 *  
## Typepavement              -0.01064    0.44663  -0.024   0.9810    
## TypeTree                  -0.25667    0.45479  -0.564   0.5728    
## Typewall                   0.30169    0.46564   0.648   0.5174    
## TimeNov_22:Typepavement    0.24559    0.63059   0.389   0.6971    
## TimeApril_23:Typepavement  0.26596    0.61815   0.430   0.6672    
## TimeNov_22:TypeTree       -0.03337    0.64272  -0.052   0.9586    
## TimeApril_23:TypeTree      0.91268    0.64810   1.408   0.1598    
## TimeNov_22:Typewall        0.10743    0.65781   0.163   0.8703    
## TimeApril_23:Typewall     -1.49056    0.66759  -2.233   0.0261 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.4288) family taken to be 1.246343)
## 
##     Null deviance: 552.00  on 423  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 480.42  on 412  degrees of freedom
##   (152 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 2848.3
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
qqnorm(resid(mod10))

car::Anova(mod10)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Time        33.627  2   4.99e-08 ***
## Type         0.474  3   0.924498    
## Time:Type   19.796  6   0.003011 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
car::Anova(mod10, test.statistic="F")
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
## Error estimate based on Pearson residuals 
## 
##           Sum Sq  Df F value    Pr(>F)    
## Time       41.91   2 16.8133 9.567e-08 ***
## Type        0.59   3  0.1581  0.924433    
## Time:Type  24.67   6  3.2993  0.003498 ** 
## Residuals 513.49 412                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mod10_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod10)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Type)
contrast(emm)  
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect    -0.00924 0.170 Inf  -0.054  0.9567
##  pavement effect  0.15064 0.136 Inf   1.106  0.5373
##  Tree effect      0.02719 0.145 Inf   0.187  0.9567
##  wall effect     -0.16859 0.152 Inf  -1.110  0.5373
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Time 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 4 tests
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Time)
contrast(emm) 
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Oct_22 effect     -0.355 0.123 Inf  -2.893  0.0057
##  Nov_22 effect     -0.209 0.123 Inf  -1.703  0.0886
##  April_23 effect    0.564 0.125 Inf   4.500  <.0001
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Type 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 3 tests
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Type|Time)
contrast(emm) 
## Time = Oct_22:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect     -0.0086 0.298 Inf  -0.029  0.9770
##  pavement effect  -0.0192 0.236 Inf  -0.082  0.9770
##  Tree effect      -0.2653 0.243 Inf  -1.090  0.5517
##  wall effect       0.2931 0.253 Inf   1.156  0.5517
## 
## Time = Nov_22:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect     -0.0885 0.297 Inf  -0.298  0.7660
##  pavement effect   0.1464 0.235 Inf   0.624  0.7099
##  Tree effect      -0.3786 0.243 Inf  -1.558  0.4092
##  wall effect       0.3206 0.253 Inf   1.269  0.4092
## 
## Time = April_23:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect      0.0694 0.289 Inf   0.240  0.8102
##  pavement effect   0.3247 0.237 Inf   1.369  0.2282
##  Tree effect       0.7254 0.268 Inf   2.711  0.0134
##  wall effect      -1.1195 0.282 Inf  -3.973  0.0003
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 4 tests
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Time | Type)
contrast(emm) 
## Type = grass:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Oct_22 effect     -0.355 0.295 Inf  -1.202  0.3282
##  Nov_22 effect     -0.288 0.295 Inf  -0.978  0.3282
##  April_23 effect    0.643 0.287 Inf   2.242  0.0748
## 
## Type = pavement:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Oct_22 effect     -0.525 0.210 Inf  -2.504  0.0184
##  Nov_22 effect     -0.213 0.209 Inf  -1.019  0.3080
##  April_23 effect    0.738 0.208 Inf   3.552  0.0011
## 
## Type = Tree:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Oct_22 effect     -0.648 0.227 Inf  -2.853  0.0065
##  Nov_22 effect     -0.615 0.227 Inf  -2.708  0.0068
##  April_23 effect    1.262 0.242 Inf   5.220  <.0001
## 
## Type = wall:
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Oct_22 effect      0.106 0.242 Inf   0.439  0.6608
##  Nov_22 effect      0.280 0.242 Inf   1.158  0.3704
##  April_23 effect   -0.387 0.260 Inf  -1.487  0.3704
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 3 tests

Sowing 2022

Creation of a data set with all the population size by years (to take into account the destroy size)

Popsize2 <- data.frame("Site_ID" = paste(April23_popsize2$Site_ID, April23_popsize2$Type, sep="_"), "Oct_22" = April23_popsize2$October_22, "Nov_22" = April23_popsize2$November_22,  "April_23" = April23_popsize2$April_23 )
tmp <- data.frame("Site_ID" = paste(April24_popsize2$Site_ID, April24_popsize2$Type, sep="_"), "EndMarch_24" = April24_popsize2$EndMarch_24)

Popsize2 <- full_join(Popsize2,tmp, by = join_by(Site_ID == Site_ID))

# rearrage the table to have all the population size in the same column
Popsize2 <- melt(Popsize2, id.vars="Site_ID")
Popsize2 <- Popsize2 %>% separate("Site_ID", c("Site_ID", "Type"))
colnames(Popsize2) <- c("Site_ID", "Type", "Time", "Nb_Idv")
Popsize2 %>% 
  ggplot( aes(x=Time, y=log(Nb_Idv), color = Time, group=Type)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis(discrete=TRUE) + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, colour= "black")+
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~Type)

Same pattern than for the sowing 2021
Wall and Meadow : Autumn population size > April one Pavement : Autumn pop size < April one spring recruitment but it is less visible

model with nested effect

Popsize2$Type <- as.factor(Popsize2$Type)
Popsize2$Time <- as.factor(Popsize2$Time)

mod9 <- glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Type/Time, data = Popsize2)

mod10 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Type/Time, data = Popsize2 ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod9[["theta"]]))
summary(mod10)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Type/Time, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod9[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                               Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                   3.822098   0.472284   8.093    3e-14 ***
## Typepavement                  0.451640   0.583008   0.775  0.43930    
## Typewall                      0.038361   0.529356   0.072  0.94229    
## Typegrass:TimeNov_22          0.101853   0.667702   0.153  0.87889    
## Typepavement:TimeNov_22      -0.507654   0.484075  -1.049  0.29538    
## Typewall:TimeNov_22           0.570662   0.337671   1.690  0.09234 .  
## Typegrass:TimeApril_23        0.579731   0.666963   0.869  0.38561    
## Typepavement:TimeApril_23    -0.489548   0.484046  -1.011  0.31287    
## Typewall:TimeApril_23         0.204058   0.340147   0.600  0.54914    
## Typegrass:TimeEndMarch_24     0.009644   0.735975   0.013  0.98956    
## Typepavement:TimeEndMarch_24 -1.365017   0.518083  -2.635  0.00897 ** 
## Typewall:TimeEndMarch_24      0.354331   0.382116   0.927  0.35472    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.597) family taken to be 1.31449)
## 
##     Null deviance: 317.65  on 249  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 300.97  on 238  degrees of freedom
##   (22 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 2481.8
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
qqnorm(resid(mod10))

car::Anova(mod10)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## Type        2.3306  2     0.3118
## Type:Time  10.3606  9     0.3221

Here I don’t have a effect of the type of habitat on the population size (same as previous) and over time neither.

mod10_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod10)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod10_emm, ~ Type)
contrast(emm)  
##  contrast        estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass effect      0.0546 0.181 Inf   0.302  0.7626
##  pavement effect  -0.2571 0.150 Inf  -1.708  0.1906
##  wall effect       0.2025 0.133 Inf   1.526  0.1906
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Time 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: fdr method for 3 tests
pairs(emm )
##  contrast         estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass - pavement    0.312 0.305 Inf   1.022  0.5632
##  grass - wall       -0.148 0.279 Inf  -0.529  0.8569
##  pavement - wall    -0.460 0.219 Inf  -2.102  0.0894
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Time 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 3 estimates

April 22 vs 23 vs 24

Sowing 2021

Graphic with log transformation

Popsize <- Popsize %>% dplyr::filter(Time == "April_22" | Time == "April_23" |Time ==  "EndMarch_24") 

ggplot(Popsize, aes(x = Time, y= log(Nb_Idv), fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

#ggsave("Popsize_aprilS_by_Year.svg", plot = last_plot(),dpi = 300, bg = "white", scale = 2 )
Popsize$Type_time <- paste(Popsize$Type, Popsize$Time, sep = "_")

colors <- c("#6ece58", "#6ece58", "#6ece58", "#1f9e89", "#1f9e89",  "#1f9e89","#31688e","#31688e", "#31688e",  "#482878", "#482878", "#482878")
Popsize %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Type_time ,y=log(Nb_Idv), fill = Type_time)) + geom_boxplot(aes(alpha = Time), show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() +  scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)+ scale_alpha_discrete(range = c(0.5,1))

#ggsave("Popsize_aprilS_by_Type.svg", plot = last_plot(),dpi = 300, bg = "white", scale = 2 )

model

mod5 <- MASS::glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Type*Time, data = Popsize)

mod6 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Type*Time, data = Popsize ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod5[["theta"]]))
summary(mod6)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Type * Time, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                   2.42208    0.29098   8.324 1.51e-15 ***
## Typepavement                  0.08788    0.36374   0.242   0.8092    
## TypeTree                     -0.03457    0.36715  -0.094   0.9250    
## Typewall                     -0.88760    0.38809  -2.287   0.0227 *  
## TimeApril_23                  0.68161    0.41272   1.652   0.0995 .  
## TimeEndMarch_24               0.34738    0.43928   0.791   0.4295    
## Typepavement:TimeApril_23     0.16745    0.51404   0.326   0.7448    
## TypeTree:TimeApril_23         0.69057    0.53722   1.285   0.1994    
## Typewall:TimeApril_23        -0.30127    0.56370  -0.534   0.5933    
## Typepavement:TimeEndMarch_24  0.63831    0.54884   1.163   0.2456    
## TypeTree:TimeEndMarch_24      1.46553    0.55057   2.662   0.0081 ** 
## Typewall:TimeEndMarch_24      0.49305    0.59235   0.832   0.4057    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.6543) family taken to be 1.361312)
## 
##     Null deviance: 596.70  on 395  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 454.21  on 384  degrees of freedom
##   (180 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 3047.4
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
qqnorm(resid(mod6))

car::Anova(mod6)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Type        43.875  3  1.605e-09 ***
## Time        36.938  2  9.527e-09 ***
## Type:Time    9.376  6     0.1535    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mod6_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod6)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod6_emm, ~ Time | Type)
pairs(emm )
## Type = grass:
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_22 - April_23      -0.682 0.413 Inf  -1.652  0.2242
##  April_22 - EndMarch_24   -0.347 0.439 Inf  -0.791  0.7087
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24    0.334 0.440 Inf   0.759  0.7282
## 
## Type = pavement:
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_22 - April_23      -0.849 0.306 Inf  -2.771  0.0154
##  April_22 - EndMarch_24   -0.986 0.329 Inf  -2.996  0.0077
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24   -0.137 0.327 Inf  -0.418  0.9082
## 
## Type = Tree:
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_22 - April_23      -1.372 0.344 Inf  -3.990  0.0002
##  April_22 - EndMarch_24   -1.813 0.332 Inf  -5.462  <.0001
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24   -0.441 0.358 Inf  -1.231  0.4348
## 
## Type = wall:
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_22 - April_23      -0.380 0.384 Inf  -0.991  0.5828
##  April_22 - EndMarch_24   -0.840 0.397 Inf  -2.115  0.0868
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24   -0.460 0.416 Inf  -1.105  0.5111
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 3 estimates
mod6_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod6)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod6_emm, ~ Type)
pairs(emm )
##  contrast         estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass - pavement   -0.356 0.219 Inf  -1.625  0.3645
##  grass - Tree       -0.684 0.225 Inf  -3.036  0.0128
##  grass - wall        0.824 0.240 Inf   3.433  0.0033
##  pavement - Tree    -0.328 0.192 Inf  -1.704  0.3215
##  pavement - wall     1.180 0.209 Inf   5.641  <.0001
##  Tree - wall         1.508 0.215 Inf   6.999  <.0001
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Time 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates
mod11 <- glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Time/Type, data = Popsize)

mod12 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Time/Type, data = Popsize ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod11[["theta"]]))
summary(mod12)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Time/Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod11[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                   2.42208    0.29098   8.324 1.51e-15 ***
## TimeApril_23                  0.68161    0.41272   1.652 0.099451 .  
## TimeEndMarch_24               0.34738    0.43928   0.791 0.429549    
## TimeApril_22:Typepavement     0.08788    0.36374   0.242 0.809224    
## TimeApril_23:Typepavement     0.25533    0.36322   0.703 0.482510    
## TimeEndMarch_24:Typepavement  0.72618    0.41100   1.767 0.078047 .  
## TimeApril_22:TypeTree        -0.03457    0.36715  -0.094 0.925043    
## TimeApril_23:TypeTree         0.65601    0.39218   1.673 0.095198 .  
## TimeEndMarch_24:TypeTree      1.43096    0.41028   3.488 0.000543 ***
## TimeApril_22:Typewall        -0.88760    0.38809  -2.287 0.022734 *  
## TimeApril_23:Typewall        -1.18887    0.40883  -2.908 0.003849 ** 
## TimeEndMarch_24:Typewall     -0.39455    0.44751  -0.882 0.378512    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.6543) family taken to be 1.361312)
## 
##     Null deviance: 596.70  on 395  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 454.21  on 384  degrees of freedom
##   (180 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 3047.4
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
qqnorm(resid(mod12))

car::Anova(mod12)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Time        51.419  2  6.832e-12 ***
## Time:Type   53.250  9  2.621e-08 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mod12_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod12)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod12_emm, ~ Time)
pairs(emm )
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_22 - April_23      -0.821 0.182 Inf  -4.510  <.0001
##  April_22 - EndMarch_24   -0.997 0.189 Inf  -5.283  <.0001
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24   -0.176 0.194 Inf  -0.906  0.6365
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Type 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 3 estimates
mod12_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod12)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod12_emm, ~ Type)
pairs(emm )
##  contrast                                 estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass April_22 - pavement April_22        -0.0879 0.364 Inf  -0.242  1.0000
##  grass April_22 - Tree April_22             0.0346 0.367 Inf   0.094  1.0000
##  grass April_22 - wall April_22             0.8876 0.388 Inf   2.287  0.4858
##  grass April_22 - grass April_23           -0.6816 0.413 Inf  -1.652  0.8897
##  grass April_22 - pavement April_23        -0.9369 0.362 Inf  -2.589  0.2855
##  grass April_22 - Tree April_23            -1.3376 0.391 Inf  -3.422  0.0306
##  grass April_22 - wall April_23             0.5073 0.408 Inf   1.244  0.9853
##  grass April_22 - grass EndMarch_24        -0.3474 0.439 Inf  -0.791  0.9997
##  grass April_22 - pavement EndMarch_24     -1.0736 0.381 Inf  -2.816  0.1728
##  grass April_22 - Tree EndMarch_24         -1.7783 0.380 Inf  -4.675  0.0002
##  grass April_22 - wall EndMarch_24          0.0472 0.420 Inf   0.112  1.0000
##  pavement April_22 - Tree April_22          0.1224 0.313 Inf   0.392  1.0000
##  pavement April_22 - wall April_22          0.9755 0.337 Inf   2.894  0.1427
##  pavement April_22 - grass April_23        -0.5937 0.365 Inf  -1.626  0.8998
##  pavement April_22 - pavement April_23     -0.8491 0.306 Inf  -2.771  0.1925
##  pavement April_22 - Tree April_23         -1.2497 0.340 Inf  -3.673  0.0128
##  pavement April_22 - wall April_23          0.5951 0.359 Inf   1.656  0.8878
##  pavement April_22 - grass EndMarch_24     -0.2595 0.395 Inf  -0.657  1.0000
##  pavement April_22 - pavement EndMarch_24  -0.9857 0.329 Inf  -2.996  0.1096
##  pavement April_22 - Tree EndMarch_24      -1.6905 0.328 Inf  -5.152  <.0001
##  pavement April_22 - wall EndMarch_24       0.1350 0.374 Inf   0.361  1.0000
##  Tree April_22 - wall April_22              0.8530 0.341 Inf   2.504  0.3373
##  Tree April_22 - grass April_23            -0.7162 0.369 Inf  -1.943  0.7317
##  Tree April_22 - pavement April_23         -0.9715 0.310 Inf  -3.129  0.0756
##  Tree April_22 - Tree April_23             -1.3722 0.344 Inf  -3.990  0.0038
##  Tree April_22 - wall April_23              0.4727 0.363 Inf   1.303  0.9790
##  Tree April_22 - grass EndMarch_24         -0.3819 0.398 Inf  -0.960  0.9984
##  Tree April_22 - pavement EndMarch_24      -1.1081 0.333 Inf  -3.330  0.0412
##  Tree April_22 - Tree EndMarch_24          -1.8129 0.332 Inf  -5.462  <.0001
##  Tree April_22 - wall EndMarch_24           0.0126 0.377 Inf   0.033  1.0000
##  wall April_22 - grass April_23            -1.5692 0.389 Inf  -4.030  0.0032
##  wall April_22 - pavement April_23         -1.8245 0.335 Inf  -5.447  <.0001
##  wall April_22 - Tree April_23             -2.2252 0.366 Inf  -6.077  <.0001
##  wall April_22 - wall April_23             -0.3803 0.384 Inf  -0.991  0.9979
##  wall April_22 - grass EndMarch_24         -1.2350 0.417 Inf  -2.959  0.1210
##  wall April_22 - pavement EndMarch_24      -1.9612 0.356 Inf  -5.512  <.0001
##  wall April_22 - Tree EndMarch_24          -2.6659 0.355 Inf  -7.511  <.0001
##  wall April_22 - wall EndMarch_24          -0.8404 0.397 Inf  -2.115  0.6120
##  grass April_23 - pavement April_23        -0.2553 0.363 Inf  -0.703  0.9999
##  grass April_23 - Tree April_23            -0.6560 0.392 Inf  -1.673  0.8808
##  grass April_23 - wall April_23             1.1889 0.409 Inf   2.908  0.1379
##  grass April_23 - grass EndMarch_24         0.3342 0.440 Inf   0.759  0.9998
##  grass April_23 - pavement EndMarch_24     -0.3920 0.382 Inf  -1.025  0.9972
##  grass April_23 - Tree EndMarch_24         -1.0967 0.382 Inf  -2.873  0.1504
##  grass April_23 - wall EndMarch_24          0.7288 0.421 Inf   1.729  0.8550
##  pavement April_23 - Tree April_23         -0.4007 0.338 Inf  -1.185  0.9902
##  pavement April_23 - wall April_23          1.4442 0.357 Inf   4.041  0.0031
##  pavement April_23 - grass EndMarch_24      0.5896 0.393 Inf   1.500  0.9411
##  pavement April_23 - pavement EndMarch_24  -0.1366 0.327 Inf  -0.418  1.0000
##  pavement April_23 - Tree EndMarch_24      -0.8414 0.326 Inf  -2.581  0.2905
##  pavement April_23 - wall EndMarch_24       0.9841 0.372 Inf   2.647  0.2534
##  Tree April_23 - wall April_23              1.8449 0.387 Inf   4.770  0.0001
##  Tree April_23 - grass EndMarch_24          0.9902 0.420 Inf   2.357  0.4354
##  Tree April_23 - pavement EndMarch_24       0.2641 0.359 Inf   0.736  0.9999
##  Tree April_23 - Tree EndMarch_24          -0.4407 0.358 Inf  -1.231  0.9866
##  Tree April_23 - wall EndMarch_24           1.3848 0.400 Inf   3.461  0.0269
##  wall April_23 - grass EndMarch_24         -0.8546 0.436 Inf  -1.962  0.7195
##  wall April_23 - pavement EndMarch_24      -1.5808 0.377 Inf  -4.194  0.0016
##  wall April_23 - Tree EndMarch_24          -2.2856 0.376 Inf  -6.076  <.0001
##  wall April_23 - wall EndMarch_24          -0.4601 0.416 Inf  -1.105  0.9946
##  grass EndMarch_24 - pavement EndMarch_24  -0.7262 0.411 Inf  -1.767  0.8361
##  grass EndMarch_24 - Tree EndMarch_24      -1.4310 0.410 Inf  -3.488  0.0246
##  grass EndMarch_24 - wall EndMarch_24       0.3946 0.448 Inf   0.882  0.9993
##  pavement EndMarch_24 - Tree EndMarch_24   -0.7048 0.347 Inf  -2.029  0.6735
##  pavement EndMarch_24 - wall EndMarch_24    1.1207 0.391 Inf   2.869  0.1520
##  Tree EndMarch_24 - wall EndMarch_24        1.8255 0.390 Inf   4.682  0.0002
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 12 estimates
mod12_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod12)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod12_emm, ~ Type, by="Time")
pairs(emm )
## Time = April_22:
##  contrast         estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass - pavement  -0.0879 0.364 Inf  -0.242  1.0000
##  grass - Tree       0.0346 0.367 Inf   0.094  1.0000
##  grass - wall       0.8876 0.388 Inf   2.287  0.6930
##  pavement - Tree    0.1224 0.313 Inf   0.392  1.0000
##  pavement - wall    0.9755 0.337 Inf   2.894  0.2554
##  Tree - wall        0.8530 0.341 Inf   2.504  0.5273
## 
## Time = April_23:
##  contrast         estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass - pavement  -0.2553 0.363 Inf  -0.703  1.0000
##  grass - Tree      -0.6560 0.392 Inf  -1.673  0.9717
##  grass - wall       1.1889 0.409 Inf   2.908  0.2478
##  pavement - Tree   -0.4007 0.338 Inf  -1.185  0.9995
##  pavement - wall    1.4442 0.357 Inf   4.041  0.0068
##  Tree - wall        1.8449 0.387 Inf   4.770  0.0003
## 
## Time = EndMarch_24:
##  contrast         estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass - pavement  -0.7262 0.411 Inf  -1.767  0.9528
##  grass - Tree      -1.4310 0.410 Inf  -3.488  0.0501
##  grass - wall       0.3946 0.448 Inf   0.882  1.0000
##  pavement - Tree   -0.7048 0.347 Inf  -2.029  0.8555
##  pavement - wall    1.1207 0.391 Inf   2.869  0.2701
##  Tree - wall        1.8255 0.390 Inf   4.682  0.0004
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 18 estimates

Sowing 2022

Graphic with log transformation

Popsize2 <- Popsize2 %>% dplyr::filter(Time == "April_23" |Time ==  "EndMarch_24") 

colors <- c( "#6ece58","#31688e","#482878")
ggplot(Popsize2, aes(x = Time, y= log(Nb_Idv), fill = Type)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  theme_minimal() + scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

Popsize2$Type_time <- paste(Popsize2$Type, Popsize2$Time, sep = "_")

colors <- c ("#6ece58", "#6ece58", "#31688e", "#31688e","#482878", "#482878")
Popsize2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Type_time ,y=log(Nb_Idv), fill = Type_time)) + geom_boxplot(aes(alpha = Time), show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() +  scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)+ scale_alpha_discrete(range = c(0.5,1))

model

mod5 <- MASS::glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Type*Time, data = Popsize2)

mod6 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Type*Time, data = Popsize2 ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod5[["theta"]]))
summary(mod6)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Type * Time, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod5[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                    4.4018     0.4126  10.668   <2e-16 ***
## Typepavement                  -0.6176     0.5104  -1.210    0.229    
## Typewall                      -0.3373     0.4639  -0.727    0.469    
## TimeEndMarch_24               -0.5701     0.6443  -0.885    0.378    
## Typepavement:TimeEndMarch_24  -0.3054     0.7889  -0.387    0.699    
## Typewall:TimeEndMarch_24       0.7204     0.7268   0.991    0.324    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.7138) family taken to be 1.204806)
## 
##     Null deviance: 145.71  on 113  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 133.75  on 108  degrees of freedom
##   (22 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 1126.1
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 6
qqnorm(resid(mod6))

car::Anova(mod6)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)  
## Type        5.9699  2    0.05054 .
## Time        0.9317  1    0.33443  
## Type:Time   3.5058  2    0.17327  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mod11 <- glm.nb(Nb_Idv ~ Time*Type, data = Popsize2)

mod12 <- glm(Nb_Idv ~ Time*Type, data = Popsize2 ,family=negative.binomial(theta=mod11[["theta"]]))
summary(mod12)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Nb_Idv ~ Time * Type, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod11[["theta"]]), 
##     data = Popsize2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                    4.4018     0.4126  10.668   <2e-16 ***
## TimeEndMarch_24               -0.5701     0.6443  -0.885    0.378    
## Typepavement                  -0.6176     0.5104  -1.210    0.229    
## Typewall                      -0.3373     0.4639  -0.727    0.469    
## TimeEndMarch_24:Typepavement  -0.3054     0.7889  -0.387    0.699    
## TimeEndMarch_24:Typewall       0.7204     0.7268   0.991    0.324    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.7138) family taken to be 1.204806)
## 
##     Null deviance: 145.71  on 113  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 133.75  on 108  degrees of freedom
##   (22 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 1126.1
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 6
qqnorm(resid(mod12))

car::Anova(mod12)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Nb_Idv
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)  
## Time        0.9317  1    0.33443  
## Type        5.9699  2    0.05054 .
## Time:Type   3.5058  2    0.17327  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
mod12_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod12)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod12_emm, ~ Time|Type)
pairs(emm )
## Type = grass:
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24    0.570 0.644 Inf   0.885  0.3763
## 
## Type = pavement:
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24    0.875 0.455 Inf   1.923  0.0544
## 
## Type = wall:
##  contrast               estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  April_23 - EndMarch_24   -0.150 0.336 Inf  -0.447  0.6551
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale.
